briefs.title: Tobacco and Vapour Warning Display Fine Updated in BC — Effective April 1, 2026
briefs.summary: BC is updating the fine structure for retailers who fail to display required health warnings for tobacco and vapour products. Effective April 1, 2026, the old fine entry under the Violation Ticket Administration and Fines Regulation is replaced with a new one for the same offence — meaning the rule still applies, but the ticketing details have been revised.
briefs.action_required: Check that all required tobacco and vapour health warning signs are properly displayed before April 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC tobacco and vapour warning display fine update takes effect
